name: cartoon
label: 卡通 / Cartoon
preamble: Playful sticker-style cartoon icons: thick rounded clean dark outlines, cute friendly shapes, flat colour fills with only subtle internal shading, vibrant soft palette. No drop shadow and no cast shadow.

construction.grid: consistent live area and padding; optical sizing
construction.detail_budget: one cute subject, matched detail level
construction.fill_rule: flat fills with subtle internal shading inside outlines
construction.color_rule: vibrant soft palette; consistent colours per concept
construction.shared_parts: consistent character style across the set
construction.shadow: none cast on background (internal shading only)

notes: Soft outlines and internal shading — always rembg cutout.
